REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFFS CINDY YU AND TOSHIYUKI MUSHA'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE TO CORRECT THE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. MAY 6, 2015 IS VACATED. 7 OUT OF 8 CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT HAVE NOT BEEN ADJUDICATED BY THE COURT, AND IN FACT, HAVE NOT BEEN ADDRESSED BEFORE THE COURT AT ANY TIME PRIOR TO JUDGMENT BEING PRESENTED TO THE COURT ADJUDICATING ALL CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE CASE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment, Or In The Alternative To Correct The Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs CINDY YU and TOSHIYUKI MUSHA's Motion To Vacate Judgment, Or In The Alternative To Correct The Judgment is GRANTED. May 6, 2015 is vacated. 7 out of 8 causes of action in the complaint have not been adjudicated by the Court, and in fact, have not been addressed before the Court at any time prior to Judgment being presented to the Court adjudicating all causes of action in the case. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
